Resolves #15269

The S1 Brain half from the graduated FM record (D#15249): a Fleet-side, read-only, viewer-admitted per-agent A2A mailbox mirror — `{viewerIdentity, subjectAgentId, limit, offset}` → immutable message rows (timestamped facts) + `partOfThread` thread metadata. **Admission is the primitive's, never re-implemented**: the adapter consumes an injected MailboxService-compatible `listMessages()` whose session binding IS the viewer, and passes `to: subjectAgentId` so the service's own fail-closed `CAN_READ_INBOX_OF` gate decides the cross-read — a missing grant surfaces as an explicit `admission.state: 'denied'` snapshot carrying the service's honest error (never an empty-success), and non-admission failures degrade as `'unavailable'`, distinctly. The `viewerIdentity` parameter is the auditable who-is-looking mapping fact (canonicalized to `@`-form beside the subject on every snapshot's admission block), not an enforcement input — the wiring owns identity binding + read permissions, exactly the sibling `fleetA2AActivityAdapter` DI contract. Two boundaries are STRUCTURAL, not configurational: the module exports read/projection functions only (no markRead/archive/mutation verb exists on the surface — the record's MUST-NOT: operator-side mark-read would mutate the agent's own turn-start signal and swallow peer handoffs), and the active/non-archived default is pinned by construction (the adapter never forwards an `includeArchived` key, so the service default always governs; archive browsing is out of v13.2 scope). Rows are frozen, body-free summary facts (subject redacted for secret-bearing text, sender, recipient class, priority, read status, task state, timestamps, related tickets); pagination clamps to `[1, 200]` with `offset >= 0` and the bounds echo on the snapshot. An agent reading its OWN inbox stays on the existing `list_messages` path untouched — the adapter adds no self-read special-casing (the primitive's no-grant-needed self path governs; spec-pinned).

Evidence: L2 (**9-spec adapter suite + the full fleet service directory 174 green at 0b5325d87f**) → L2 required (all close-target ACs are pure-module projection/admission contracts; the live `CAN_READ_INBOX_OF` grant exercise is post-merge scope on the consuming pane). Residual: none in delivered scope.

## Deltas from ticket

- **Producer-first, no in-repo consumer** — exactly the sibling `fleetA2AActivityAdapter` precedent (it landed consumer-free too): the `FleetControlBridge` injectable-source wiring and the cockpit pane ride with #15270 (the sibling S1 view half, blocked on this leaf), keeping this PR one-leaf.
- **No `threadId` filter parameter**: the AC contract shape is `{viewerIdentity, subjectAgentId, limit, offset}` verbatim; thread metadata rides on every row via `partOfThread`. Adding a filter param would widen the surface beyond the record's resolution tokens — deferred until a consumer needs it.
- **`admission` block added to the snapshot shape** (beyond the AC's literal "rows + thread metadata"): the record requires admission checks to be auditable — the block carries `{state, viewerIdentity, subjectAgentId, checkedAt, reason}` so every read is a self-describing audit fact, including denials.

## Contract Ledger

| Target Surface | Source of Authority | Proposed Behavior | Fallback | Docs | Evidence |
|---|---|---|---|---|---|
| `readFleetMailboxMirror(options)` | D#15249 S1 boundary ACs (verbatim) + Surface Registry #15254 | viewer-bound read of one agent's ACTIVE inbox → frozen snapshot | degraded snapshot with named reason (never fabricated rows) | module JSDoc | 9-spec suite |
| `admission` snapshot block | record AC "admission checks are auditable" | `granted` / `denied` (CAN_READ_INBOX_OF throw) / `unavailable` (other failure) + canonical viewer/subject + checkedAt | `unavailable` on unnamed failures | module JSDoc | denial + degradation specs |
| mirror row shape | MailboxService `listMessages()` summary contract | frozen, body-free projection incl. `partOfThread`, redacted subject | absent fields → `null`, never guessed | JSDoc on `createMirrorRow` | grant-path spec |
| mutation verbs on this surface | record MUST-NOT (mark-read swallows peer handoffs; adjacent evidence #15253) | structurally absent — read/projection exports only | n/a (nothing to fall back from) | module JSDoc | export-surface spec |
| `includeArchived` exposure | ticket "archive stays opt-in; out of v13.2 scope" | never forwarded — service default (active inbox) always governs | n/a | module JSDoc | structural-pin spec (exact call-arg keys) |

## Test Evidence

- New suite `test/playwright/unit/ai/services/fleet/fleetMailboxMirrorAdapter.spec.mjs` — **9 passed at 0b5325d87f**: grant-path projection (frozen snapshot/rows, body-free keys, thread metadata, audit fact, viewer-bound call shape); admission fail-closed (the primitive's CAN_READ_INBOX_OF throw → explicit `denied`, empty rows, honest reason); non-admission degradation (`unavailable`, distinct from denial); missing read-path / missing identities never fabricate; pagination clamps (`[1, 200]`, `offset >= 0`, echoed bounds, non-numeric → default); the structural active-default pin (exact forwarded-key set, no `includeArchived`); the structural read-only export surface (exact export-name set, no mutation verb); canonical identity mapping (bare login → `@`-form; self-read maps through unchanged); secret redaction on subjects + denial reasons.
- Full fleet service directory — **174 passed** at the head (the new suite + every sibling).
- Directly touched surfaces: `ai/services/fleet/fleetMailboxMirrorAdapter.mjs`: fleetMailboxMirrorAdapter.spec.mjs.
